text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
A message? It's Curren again... What is it this
time?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't get that girl... How does she expect me to
respond?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...I already told her I'm not interested in photos of
cute, fluffy animals.
